<!--
Thanks for opening a PR! Fill in each section below.
A good PR description makes review 10x faster — and reviewers 10x friendlier.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- A one-paragraph summary. What does it do from a user's perspective? -->

## Why?

<!-- The motivation. -->

## How does it work?

<!-- Optional: briefly walk through the approach, especially for non-obvious parts. -->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- If this is a UI change, drop before/after screenshots or a screen recording. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I wrote the code in a new branch, not `main`.
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, etc.).
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (lint + format + typecheck + test).
- [ ] I added tests for new logic (or noted why tests weren't needed).
- [ ] I updated docs (`README.md`, `docs/*`) if behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not commit any secrets (API keys, tokens, `.env` files).
